calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Lawrence Sussman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Matthew Payne, also present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Proposal & Contract -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Reconciliation -------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Work Performed -------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Reconciliation -------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5---Reconciliation -------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Noel Kou, Ind. and dba. Noel E. Kou Construction Co. as follows:
Damages $108,925.31
Costs $380.00, for a total of $109,305.31
Counsle stipulated for the return of the Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
